content:
Character: Takumi Sato
Perception: Takumi is lean, precise, and immaculately put together — the kind of person whose stillness makes you conscious of your own fidgeting. He has a narrow, handsome face and hands that move like they're solving equations. His sushi bar is the best meal I eat all week, and watching him work is like watching someone code in a language that has no bugs. He's reserved to the point of seeming cold, but he once left a plate of surplus tuna nigiri outside my door with a note that just said "Monday" — his day off. That told me everything about who he is. I know he wakes before dawn, bikes to the fish market, and lives alone. I suspect the restaurant is struggling financially but he would never say so.
